overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a character in a tan coat exploring the snowy wizarding village of Hogsmeade. The character walks along cobblestone streets past Tudor-style buildings, enters a sporting goods shop to browse Quidditch equipment, then exits and approaches Ollivanders wand shop.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy cobblestone main street in historic wizarding village

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the snowy village street, passing NPCs and browsing the shop facades

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting on wooden bench on the right side of the street
NPC in blue coat walking away in the distance

entered.detail: snow-dusted cobblestone road with visible footprints and patches of ice
half-timbered medieval building with snow-covered roof and icicles
stone and timber building with overhanging upper floors
distinctive tall building with steeply pitched roof at the end of the street
green garlands strung across the street between buildings

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the snowy main street of Hogsmeade village, flanked by Tudor-style buildings with snow-laden roofs. The cobblestone path is partially covered in snow, and a few NPCs are scattered about, including one sitting on a bench to the right. Festive garlands hang overhead between the buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching the entrance of a sporting goods shop with colorful pennant banners

events.description: character opens the red door and enters the shop interior

agents.ego_description: turning toward the shop and walking up the stone steps to enter through the red wooden door

entered.detail: red wooden door with stone steps leading up to it, framed by colorful triangular pennant banners
snow-dusted wooden picnic tables and benches outside the shop
dark interior of the shop visible through the open doorway

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a specific shop entrance marked by a red door and colorful pennant banners. After ascending the stone steps, the character opens the door and transitions from the bright snowy exterior into the dimly lit shop interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior of a sporting goods shop with Quidditch equipment and wooden furnishings

events.description: character pauses to look at the shopkeeper and examine the merchandise displays

agents.ego_description: walking around the shop interior, examining displays of brooms, Quidditch robes, and sporting equipment

notable_agents.action: shopkeeper standing behind the wooden counter wearing a red sweater

entered.detail: tall dark wooden shelving units filled with stacked boxes and Quidditch supplies
mannequin wearing blue Quidditch robes standing in a decorative alcove
large wooden barrel used as a display stand near the entrance
collection of black and white wizarding photographs hanging on the teal painted walls
broomstick lying on a purple velvet bench near the window

segments.scene_description: Inside the cozy shop, the character explores the merchandise while warm light filters through the windows. The shopkeeper stands behind a wooden counter surrounded by shelves of Quidditch equipment. The character examines various displays including a mannequin in blue robes and a broomstick resting on a velvet bench.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy village square approaching Ollivanders wand shop

events.description: character exits the sporting goods shop back into the snowy street
character approaches and enters the Ollivanders wand shop

agents.ego_description: exiting the shop and walking across the cobblestone square toward the distinctive curved facade of Ollivanders

entered.detail: tall narrow stone building with distinctive curved bay windows and golden signage reading OLLIVANDERS
tall stone chimney with smoke rising against the sky

segments.scene_description: The character exits back into the snowy village and walks toward Ollivanders wand shop, identifiable by its unique curved windows and golden signage. The surrounding area features bare winter trees and a tall stone chimney, with the cobblestone square largely empty of other villagers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the snowy streets of Hogsmeade into a cozy sporting goods shop before returning to the winter village. It begins with the character walking along a cobblestone path flanked by snow-laden Tudor buildings and festive garlands, passing a villager resting on a bench. As the character approaches a red door adorned with colorful pennants, the camera ascends stone steps and transitions from the bright, cold exterior into a dimly lit interior filled with warm light. The scene then shifts to an exploration of the shop's merchandise, moving past a wooden counter and a mannequin in blue robes toward a broomstick resting on a velvet bench. Finally, the camera follows the character back out into the snowy air, moving past bare winter trees and a tall stone chimney toward the curved windows and golden signage of Ollivanders wand shop.
